findings.message: Adding a required (non-null) argument `description: str` to the existing `create_item` mutation is a breaking schema change. Existing clients that call `create_item(name: ...)` without `description` will now fail validation, with no backwards-compatible path provided.
findings.suggestion: Make the new argument nullable with a default so existing clients keep working: `description: str | None = None`. Deprecate the old form and require `description` only after clients migrate.
